title: psychotria nervosa var. rufescens
intro: Psychotria nervosa var. rufescens, also known as the Red Leaf Wild Coffee, is a plant species native to Central and South America. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Psychotria nervosa var. rufescens include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
